overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a small drone exploring a neon-lit industrial rooftop at night. The drone navigates through warning barriers and industrial structures before revealing a breathtaking view of a futuristic cityscape dominated by massive digital billboards.

agents.ego_description: small red drone moving forward through industrial platform navigating between yellow warning barriers

entered.detail: concrete rooftop surface with metal grating sections and industrial equipment
black and yellow striped barriers with triangular warning symbols
horizontal cyan neon tubes mounted on building edges
tall dark industrial buildings with horizontal ventilation lines

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark industrial rooftop illuminated by cyan neon strips. A small red drone moves forward through a maze of yellow and black warning barriers, exploring the concrete platform surrounded by massive industrial structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial rooftop corridor with red lighting

events.description: drone makes a left turn navigating around industrial equipment and structures

agents.ego_description: drone navigates through tighter industrial corridors passing red warning lights and approaching communication towers

entered.detail: small red glowing indicator lights on platform edges and equipment
tall metal towers with red aviation warning lights on top

segments.scene_description: The drone turns left into a narrower corridor between industrial buildings, passing red warning lights. Communication towers with red aviation lights become visible in the distance as the drone continues navigating the rooftop complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop edge with sky and city views

events.description: camera tilts upward from platform to reveal night sky and full moon
camera tilts down from sky to reveal cityscape and massive billboard below

agents.ego_description: drone reaches platform edge and camera pans up to moon then down to reveal the city view below

entered.detail: bright full moon visible in the clear night sky
distant city lights and buildings visible through light fog

segments.scene_description: Reaching the platform edge, the camera tilts upward to reveal a full moon and communication towers silhouetted against the night sky. The camera then tilts down to expose the sprawling cyberpunk cityscape below, with a massive digital billboard coming into view.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city overlook with digital billboard

events.description: massive digital billboard becomes fully visible dominating the city view

agents.ego_description: camera slowly pans across the breathtaking cityscape focusing on the massive illuminated billboard and neon-lit buildings

entered.detail: tall vertical digital billboard displaying VARGAS advertisement with changing neon graphics and text
cluster of red and blue neon signs on distant buildings

segments.scene_description: The final segment reveals a stunning cyberpunk cityscape dominated by a massive vertical digital billboard displaying vibrant neon advertisements. The camera slowly pans across the scene, showcasing the dense cluster of illuminated buildings and neon signs stretching into the foggy distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic confines of a dark industrial rooftop to a sweeping panoramic view of a neon-drenched futuristic metropolis. It begins with a small red drone navigating a maze of yellow and black warning barriers on a concrete platform illuminated by cyan neon strips. As the drone turns left into a narrow corridor, it passes red warning lights and moves toward distant communication towers that punctuate the night sky. Upon reaching the platform's edge, the camera tilts upward toward a full moon before dipping down to reveal the sprawling urban expanse below. The scene finally opens into a breathtaking vista dominated by a massive vertical digital billboard, panning across a dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers and neon signs that fade into the foggy distance.
